parameters.query:
SELECT 
  -- Inventory fields
  i.id as inventory_id,
  i.package_id,
  i.location_id,
  i.lot_number,
  i.expiry_date,
  i.quantity_on_hand,
  i.quantity_reserved,
  i.quantity_available,
  i.reorder_threshold,
  i.min_stock_level,
  i.last_alert_sent,
  i.alert_cooldown_hours,
  i.last_updated,
  
  -- Package details
  np.package_ndc,
  np.description as package_description,
  
  -- Product details
  prod.brand_name,
  prod.generic_name,
  prod.dosage_form,
  prod.route,
  
  -- Calculate severity (CRITICAL ADDITION!)
  CASE 
    WHEN i.quantity_on_hand <= i.min_stock_level THEN 'CRITICAL'
    WHEN i.quantity_on_hand <= (i.reorder_threshold * 0.3) THEN 'HIGH'
    WHEN i.quantity_on_hand <= (i.reorder_threshold * 0.5) THEN 'MEDIUM'
    ELSE 'LOW'
  END as severity,
  
  -- Calculate percentage remaining
  ROUND((i.quantity_on_hand::DECIMAL / NULLIF(i.reorder_threshold, 0)) * 100, 1) as percent_remaining,
  
  -- Hours since last alert
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.last_alert_sent)) / 3600 as hours_since_alert

FROM inventory i
INNER JOIN ndc_package np ON np.id = i.package_id
INNER JOIN ndc_product prod ON prod.id = np.product_id

WHERE 
  -- Below reorder threshold
  i.quantity_on_hand <= i.reorder_threshold
  
  -- Cooldown check: haven't alerted recently
  AND (
    i.last_alert_sent IS NULL 
    OR i.last_alert_sent < NOW() - (i.alert_cooldown_hours || ' hours')::INTERVAL
  )
  
  -- Not expired yet
  AND i.expiry_date > NOW()
  
ORDER BY 
  -- Most urgent first
  (i.quantity_on_hand::FLOAT / NULLIF(i.reorder_threshold, 0)) ASC,
  i.quantity_on_hand ASC
  
LIMIT 100;

INSERT INTO inventory_alert (
  inventory_id, type, severity, message, quantity_at_alert, threshold_at_alert, "createdAt"
)
SELECT 
  (item->>'inventory_id')::INTEGER,
  CASE WHEN (item->>'severity')::TEXT = 'CRITICAL' THEN 'CRITICAL_STOCK'::"InventoryAlertType" ELSE 'LOW_STOCK'::"InventoryAlertType" END,
  (item->>'severity')::TEXT::"AlertSeverity",
  'Stock level: ' || (item->>'quantity_at_alert') || ' (threshold: ' || (item->>'reorder_threshold') || ')',
  (item->>'quantity_at_alert')::INTEGER,
  (item->>'reorder_threshold')::INTEGER,
  NOW()
FROM jsonb_array_elements('{{ JSON.stringify($("Format Low Stock Alert").item.json.alert_data) }}'::jsonb) AS item
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM inventory_alert ia WHERE ia.inventory_id = (item->>'inventory_id')::INTEGER
  AND ia.type IN ('LOW_STOCK', 'CRITICAL_STOCK') AND ia."createdAt" > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
);

SELECT true as success, 'Alerts created' as message, '{{ JSON.stringify($("Format Low Stock Alert").item.json.alert_data) }}'::jsonb as alert_data;

INSERT INTO low_stock_alert_log (
  inventory_id, package_id, location_id, quantity_at_alert, reorder_threshold, severity, notification_sent, notification_channel, "createdAt"
)
SELECT 
  (item->>'inventory_id')::INTEGER,
  (item->>'package_id')::INTEGER,
  COALESCE((item->>'location_id')::INTEGER, (SELECT location_id FROM inventory WHERE id = (item->>'inventory_id')::INTEGER)),
  (item->>'quantity_at_alert')::INTEGER,
  (item->>'reorder_threshold')::INTEGER,
  (item->>'severity')::TEXT::"AlertSeverity",
  true, 'SLACK', NOW()
FROM jsonb_array_elements('{{ $json.alert_data }}'::jsonb) AS item
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM low_stock_alert_log lsal WHERE lsal.inventory_id = (item->>'inventory_id')::INTEGER
  AND lsal.notification_sent = true AND lsal."createdAt" > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
);

SELECT true as success, 'Detailed alerts logged' as message, '{{  $json.alert_data}}'::jsonb as alert_data;
